item.name: Papa Paissa Whistle
item.description: When blown, this whistle emits a blank sound that brings Papa Paissa shuffling to your side.

mount.name: Papa Paissa
mount.action: Summon forth Papa Paissa. It's for a good cause.
mount.description: This exceptionally large paissa has sired no less than eight offspring, and in order to earn the coin to rear them, it chose to work as an adventurer's mount. By taking it into your service, you are supporting its adorable brood.
mount.tooltip:
I can only imagine the
burden they bear with
so many mouths to feed.
- Pip
